message:
🐛 Add aria-label to 4 port-forward form inputs (WCAG 1.3.1) (#10874)

The port-forward form in cardFactoryTemplatesT2.ts had 4 input fields
with placeholder text but no associated labels or aria-label attributes.
Screen readers could not describe these fields.

Add aria-label to: Namespace, Resource, Local port, Remote port inputs.

Note: The bead listed 10 images missing alt and 5 inputs missing labels,
but scanning the current codebase shows all 10 images already have alt
text and the Events.tsx input already has an htmlFor-linked label. Only
these 4 port-forward inputs were actually missing accessibility labels.

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <clubanderson@gmail.com>
Co-authored-by: Andy Anderson <clubanderson@gmail.com>
Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>
